## Parity & proof

- [ ] Change lands in BOTH editions (or is genuinely edition-agnostic)
- [ ] `python3 tests/run_tests.py --runtime node` green
- [ ] `python3 tests/run_tests.py --runtime python` green
- [ ] New behavior has fixture + checks (extraction changes especially)
- [ ] README/docs claims still true after this change
